description: feat: add task CSV export endpoint

findings.description: Null dereference: issue.assignee.name is accessed without checking whether assignee is null. When a task has no assignee the expression throws 'Cannot read properties of null (reading name)'.

Missing error handling: the await writeFile(...) call has no try/catch block. Any I/O failure (disk full, permission denied, etc.) causes an unhandled promise rejection that crashes the request without returning a proper HTTP error response.

Off-by-one in pagination filter: the condition `i > offset + limit` should be `i < offset + limit`. As written, items before the offset are included and items within the requested page are excluded — the logic is inverted.

Missing input validation: the 'limit' query parameter is parsed with parseInt and used directly in a DB query without an upper bound. A caller can pass limit=9999999 triggering unbounded memory allocation and query load (potential DoS).
Wrong HTTP status code: the route returns 200 OK after creating a new export artifact. Resource creation should return 201 Created per HTTP semantics.
